headline: A Look At Constellation Energy (CEG) Valuation After Stock Volatility And Analyst Target Cut
summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) is back in focus after a sharp one day stock drop of more than 6% following an analyst valuation cut, even though Q1 2026 results and Calpine driven revenue growth appeared strong. See our latest analysis for Constellation Energy. Beyond the one day drop, the stock has been in a clear correction, with the share price down 12% over the past week and 27.04% year to date. However, the 3 year total shareholder return of 231.35% remains very strong. This suggests that...
